# CBCentralManagerOptionRestoreIdentifierKey

**Global Variable**

A string containing a unique identifier (UID) for the central manager to instantiate.

## Declaration

```swift
let CBCentralManagerOptionRestoreIdentifierKey: String
```

## Discussion

The value for this key is an [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSString]. The system uses this UID to identify a specific central manager. As a result, the UID must remain the same for subsequent executions of the app to restore the central manager.

## Constants

- **CBCentralManagerOptionShowPowerAlertKey**: A Boolean value that specifies whether the system warns the user if the app instantiates the central manager when Bluetooth service isn’t available.
